raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.3,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 1.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 0.0,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Assess the delta against nearest prior work across PPLs, calibration/selective prediction, and Bayesian semantics to substantiate the novelty claims.",
    "R1.7": "Ensure coverage and accurate attribution to relevant literature with correct citations supporting each positioning claim.",
    "RX.1": "Disclose uncertainty about literature completeness and confidence in any 'first' claims.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid overstated or absolute claims of novelty unless rigorously supported by evidence and citations.",
    "RX.3": "Keep the work strictly scoped to positioning against prior work without drifting into rewriting or new experimentation.",
    "RX.4": "Prevent misleading characterizations that could unfairly diminish prior contributions or misinform readers.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain traceable links from each comparative claim to specific cited works and passages."
  }
}

rationale.R1.4: Assess the delta against nearest prior work across PPLs, calibration/selective prediction, and Bayesian semantics to substantiate the novelty claims.
rationale.R1.7: Ensure coverage and accurate attribution to relevant literature with correct citations supporting each positioning claim.
rationale.RX.1: Disclose uncertainty about literature completeness and confidence in any 'first' claims.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid overstated or absolute claims of novelty unless rigorously supported by evidence and citations.
rationale.RX.3: Keep the work strictly scoped to positioning against prior work without drifting into rewriting or new experimentation.
rationale.RX.4: Prevent misleading characterizations that could unfairly diminish prior contributions or misinform readers.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain traceable links from each comparative claim to specific cited works and passages.
